# expo-detect-carplay

> Expo native module for observing CarPlay and Android Auto connection state on
> iOS and Android. It requires a development build and does not run in Expo Go.

Install with `npx expo install expo-detect-carplay`, add
`expo-detect-carplay` to the Expo `plugins` array, rebuild native projects, and
request permissions before starting Android monitoring. Basic iOS detection
uses the active car-audio route and requires neither a CarPlay entitlement nor
location permission, but it cannot launch a terminated app. On iOS,
`requestPermissionsAsync` requests Always Location access and should only be
called after location usage descriptions are configured. Enable the Driving
Task entitlement only when Apple has granted it and the provisioning profile
contains it.

Prefer the named `ExpoDetectCarplay` export for new code. The default export is
retained for compatibility. The optional background-geolocation bridge requires
`react-native-background-geolocation` in the consuming app.

## Start here

- [Documentation index](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/index.md): Routes documentation by task.
- [Getting started](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/getting-started.md): Installation, app configuration, permissions, and first monitor.
- [Platform support](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/platform-support.md): Android, iOS, and web behavior and constraints.

## Guides

- [Monitoring](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/monitoring.md): Persistent observation, events, status snapshots, diagnostics, and hook usage.
- [Config plugin](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/config-plugin.md): Android Auto registration, iOS location wakes, Driving Task entitlement, and typed options.
- [Background geolocation](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/background-geolocation.md): Optional vehicle lifecycle integration.
- [Event data](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/event-data.md): SQLite logs, notifications, and native HTTP forwarding.
- [Errors](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/blob/master/docs/errors.md): Typed error codes and corrective actions.

## API reference

- [Runtime API](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/tree/master/docs/reference/runtime): Generated from public TypeScript and TSDoc.
- [Config-plugin API](https://github.com/Mike89745/ExpoDetectCarplay/tree/master/docs/reference/plugin): Generated from config-plugin exports and TSDoc.
